friends including one Dr. Komal Khanna (co-accused and appellant 
in criminal appeal arising out of Diary No.33284/2024) and money 
was extorted from the complainant’s firms by putting undue pressure 
on the complainant.
3. 
The FIR itself was filed on 29.10.2022. The complainant then filed a 
petition under Section 482 of the Criminal Procedure Code (‘CrPC’) 
before the Punjab and Haryana High Court seeking transfer of 
investigation from the civil police of the State of Haryana to the 
Central Bureau of Investigation (for short ‘CBI’). This petition (under 
Section 482 CrPC) filed by respondent no.3, has been allowed by 
the High Court vide impugned order dated 17.05.2024 where the 
learned Single Judge directed that the investigation in the case be 
handed over to CBI. Aggrieved by the same, the appellant who is 
the main accused in the FIR is before us. 
4.
